# CLAUDE.md — complete-phase-1-example

## Project

complete-phase-1-example

Demonstrates every field supported by the Phase 1 contract schema.

## Environment

- Runtime `node`: `>=20 <23`

- Package manager: `pnpm@10`

## Commands

- **build**: `pnpm build` — Compiles the project into dist/.

- **install**: `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile`

- **lint**: `pnpm lint`

- **test**: `pnpm test`

- **typecheck**: `pnpm typecheck`

## Verification

Required before considering work complete: `lint`, `typecheck`, `test`, `build`.

## Paths

- Protected: `.env*`

- Generated: `src/generated/**`

- Ignored: `dist/**`, `node_modules/**`

## Further instructions

See the following files for more detail:
- [README.md](README.md)
- [docs/architecture.md](docs/architecture.md)
